subcodes.first_line: We hear in this moment the Call that hath been raised betwixt earth and heaven, as though a Herald [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نسمع فی هذا الحین الندآء الذی ارتفع بین الارض و السماء کان المنادی
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement
